name: interntrack-free
description: InternTrack SaaS - Free Tier (Vercel + Render + Supabase)

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.postinstall: cd backend && npm install && npx prisma generate
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
